name: Roma Chicken Express
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, halves, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to a 1/4-inch thickness on a hard surface using a meat mallet or similar flattening utensil.
2. Spread pesto evenly on each side of the chicken breasts.
3. Spray a large non-stick frypan with vegetable cooking spray (such as PAM) and heat quickly on high until the pan is very hot.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and add the chicken, searing for 3-4 minutes or until lightly browned on both sides.
5. Remove the chicken and set aside.
6. To the drippings in the pan, add broth, balsamic vinegar, chopped mushrooms, and chopped onion. Cook for 1 minute, stirring to loosen the brown bits from the bottom of the pan.
7. Add the browned chicken, turning to coat. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
8. Season with garlic salt and pepper. Garnish with roasted red pepper, black olives, and cilantro.
